positive: A detailed illustration of a stylized, ethereal forest creature—a playful, mythical woodland spirit with large, gentle eyes, resembling a blend of fox and owl. The creature is depicted in a dynamic, leaping pose, surrounded by bioluminescent flora (glowing mushrooms, ferns) and delicate magical energy trails. The style should be neo-art nouveau mixed with modern kawaii aesthetics, featuring intricate line work, solid black silhouettes for definition, and vivid color gradients (electric blues, soft emeralds, warm golds). The composition must be perfectly centered and framed for apparel printing, maintaining strong contrast and clean edges against a usable background field. Focus on symmetry and harmony in the design.
